requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the core information is not fully recoverable from text alone

multi_step: the task asks to judge which option is correct from a motion graph, which typically requires reading the graph and comparing derived motion properties
choices include different claim types: motion type from the start, speed at the end of 2 s, and displacement during the 2nd second
solving likely needs at least two operations such as interpreting the graph and then checking numerical/kinematic statements
verifiability: the problem is effectively multiple-choice with 4 explicit options, so a selected option can be checked against the image-derived interpretation
answer_present=true and registry_passed=true support basic sample completeness
